user.title: Chenoweth Elementary Menu Setup
user.description: Choose the calendar where menu events will be created. A **Local Calendar** named *School Menu* works well – create one in Settings → Integrations → Local Calendar if you haven't already.

data_description.calendar_entity: The HA calendar entity that will receive a menu event for each school day.

sync_menu.name: Sync menu
sync_menu.description: Fetches the latest breakfast and lunch menus from Nutrislice and writes them as events to the configured calendar. Call this from an automation on whatever schedule you prefer.
